cases.name: higher-priority-value route is selected
cases.description: Inputs: 1x item0 and two alternative item0->item2 recipes with priorities 0 and 10. Output target: 1x item2. Why: priority pruning keeps the stronger-priority route for this output, so usage is [0,1] and inventory ends with item0=0, item2=1.

cases.name: unrelated recipe is eliminated
cases.description: Inputs: item0 and item3, with target only requiring item2 from recipe item0->item2; extra recipe item3->item4 is irrelevant. Output target: 1x item2. Why: relevance pruning drops unrelated branches, so only the target-producing recipe runs and unrelated usage stays zero.
